figures.caption: Real SPICE calls per repeated episode. Lower is better.

figures.caption: Optimization step at which a feasible candidate first appears. Lower is better.

figures.caption: Count of dominant failure modes that were already seen in previous episodes. Lower is better.
figures.title: Repeated-Episode Memory Ablation: Repeated Failure Count

figures.caption: Mean absolute prediction gap extracted from calibration residuals after each repeated episode. Lower is better.
figures.title: Repeated-Episode Memory Ablation: Prediction Gap

figures.caption: Binary feasibility hit per repeated episode, used to expose whether retrieval translates into solved episodes.
figures.title: Repeated-Episode Memory Ablation: Feasible Hit by Episode

figures.caption: How much memory advice is actually consumed by downstream decision making.
